action: Define an atomic persistence adapter and crash-recovery test proving the retained monotonic state anchor cannot be partially written or silently reset.

progress.verification: 6 deterministic dependency-free Node tests passed locally against byte-identical pre-commit source.

handoff: R-015 should add a two-copy or hardware-backed external anchor strategy and adversarial tests for privileged deletion, filesystem replacement, and cross-device rename failure.
limits: Power-loss behavior was not tested on physical filesystems.
Atomic rename and directory fsync behavior is platform and filesystem dependent.
Privileged deletion or replacement of the entire anchor directory remains outside this adapter's trust boundary.
Persistence continuity does not prove witness honesty or policy truth.
